rationale: The proposed change concerns the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Gov't Code §2063.103 governs cybersecurity training for government employees. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Each elected or appointed official and employee of a governmental entity who has access to the entity's information resources or information resources technologies shall annually complete a cybersecurity training program certified under Section 2063.102.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption change and cybersecurity training statute.
